mapper.update: update base_organization_function set alone_flag = #{bean.aloneFlag}, tax_registration_number = #{bean.taxRegistrationNumber}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name=#{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date=#{bean.modifiedDate} where org_id = #{bean.orgId} and function_type=#{bean.funcType}
mapper.sql: function_type, state, org_id, alone_flag, tax_registration_number, created_by, created_name, created_date
